subject: English
chapter: A Tale of Valour: Major Somnath Sharma and the Battle of Badgam

activities_projects.title: Qualities of a Brave Soldier
activities_projects.objective: Identify the qualities required in a soldier
steps: Read the introduction of the chapter about Major Somnath Sharma
List the qualities that a soldier should have
Discuss your list with classmates
Compare your ideas with examples from the story
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand qualities such as courage, duty, and patriotism
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of ideas shared and participation in discussion (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Republic Day Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Understand national celebrations and bravery awards
steps: Discuss the Republic Day Parade celebrated on 26 January
Identify the highlights of the parade
Find out the bravery awards presented on this day
Share your answers with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn about national pride and gallantry awards
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of answers and participation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Battle of Badgam Timeline
activities_projects.objective: Understand the sequence of events in the Battle of Badgam
steps: Read the chapter carefully
Identify key events of the battle
Arrange the events in chronological order
Present the timeline in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand historical events and sequencing
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct timeline and clarity of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Character Study of Major Somnath Sharma
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the character traits of Major Somnath Sharma
steps: Read the sections describing the battle
Write the qualities shown by Major Somnath Sharma
Find examples from the text supporting these qualities
Share your findings with classmates
activities_projects.evaluation: Use of examples and clarity of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Patriotic Role Play
steps: Form groups of students
Assign roles such as Major Somnath Sharma and soldiers
Recreate the battle scene from the story
Perform the scene in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students gain deeper understanding of the story through performance

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Building
activities_projects.objective: Improve vocabulary using words from the chapter
steps: Identify difficult words such as 'valour', 'resolute', and 'tenacity'
Write their meanings in your notebook
Use each word in a sentence
Share your sentences in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students enhance vocabulary and sentence formation skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct meanings and sentence usage (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Collective Nouns in the Armed Forces
activities_projects.objective: Learn collective nouns used in the military
steps: Study collective nouns such as regiment, battalion, and squadron
Match them with their meanings
Write sentences using these collective nouns
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn collective nouns related to the armed forces
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct usage of collective nouns (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Expressions from the Story
activities_projects.objective: Understand phrases used in the text
steps: Identify expressions like 'hold their ground' and 'foil the plan'
Discuss their meanings
Use them in sentences
Share your sentences with the class
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct interpretation and sentence formation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Patriotic Speech
steps: Think about how citizens can serve their nation
Write a short speech on patriotism
Present your speech in front of the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop confidence and public speaking ability
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity, confidence, and relevance of ideas (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Letter of Enquiry Writing
steps: Imagine your school wants to visit a war memorial
Write a letter of enquiry to the memorial authority
Ask about visiting dates, entry fees, and guidelines
Submit the letter to your teacher
activities_projects.evaluation: Structure, grammar, and clarity in the letter (10 marks)
